verses.text: Hihte pen Moses leh Aaron' makaihna tawh Egypt gam panin a honin a paikhiat lai-un Israel mite' giahphualte ahi hi
Moses in Topa' thupiakna tawh phual khat khit phual khat amau' kipatna munte a gelh hi. Hihte pen amau' kipatna mun tawh kizui-in a giahphualte ahi hi
A kha masa, tua kha ni sawm leh ni nga ni-in Rameses panin amaute dingkhia uh hi. Paisan Pawi masa ni khit a zing ciangin Egypt mite khempeuh' muhna-ah gualzawhna tawh Israel mite paikhia uh a
Topa in amaute' lakah a thahlup tacil khempeuh Egypt mite in a vui laitak uh ahi hi. Topa in amau pasian-te zogawp hi
Tua ahih ciangin Rameses panin Israel mite dingkhia uh a, Sukkoth-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Sukkoth panin dingkhia uh a, a gam monga om Etham-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Etham panin dingkhia uh a, Baalzefon nisuahna lama om Pihahiroth lamah kihei kik uh a, Migdol mai-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Pihahiroth mai panin dingkhia uh a, tuipi laizang kantanin sehnel gamah pai-in Etham gam sungah ni thum lam pai uh a, Marah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Marah panin dingkhia uh a, Elim tung uh hi. Elim-ah cik tuikhuk sawmlenih leh nisuh kung sawmsagih om a, amaute in tua lai-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Elim panin dingkhia uh a, San Tuipi gei-ah giahphual sat uh hi
San Tuipi panin dingkhia uh a, Sin sehnel gamah giahphual sat uh hi
Sin gam panin dingkhia uh a, Dofkah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Dofkah panin dingkhia uh a, Alush-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Alush panin dingkhia uh a, mite' dawn ding tui a omlohna Refidim-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Refidim panin dingkhia uh a, Sinai sehnel gamah giahphual sat uh hi
Sinai gam panin dingkhia uh a, Kibrothhattaavah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Kibrothhattaavah panin dingkhia uh a, Hazeroth-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Hazeroth panin dingkhia uh a, Rithmah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Rithmah panin dingkhia uh a, Rimmonperez-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Rimmonperez panin dingkhia uh a, Libnah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Ribnah panin dingkhia uh a, Rissah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Rissah panin dingkhia uh a, Kehelathah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Kehelathah panin dingkhia uh a, Shefer Mual-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Shefer Mual panin dingkhia uh a, Haradah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Haradah panin dingkhia uh a, Makheloth-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Makheloth panin dingkhia uh a, Tahath-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Tahath panin dingkhia uh a, Terah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Terah panin dingkhia uh a, Mithkah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Mithkah panin dingkhia uh a, Hashmonah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Hashmonah panin dingkhia uh a, Moseroth-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Moseroth panin dingkhia uh a, Benejaakan-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Benejaakan panin dingkhia uh a, Horhaggidgad-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Horhaggidgad panin dingkhia uh a, Jotbathah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Jotbathah panin dingkhia uh a, Ebronah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Ebronah panin dingkhia uh a, Eziongeber-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Eziongeber panin dingkhia uh a, (Kadesh ahi) Zin gamah giahphual sat uh hi
Kadesh panin dingkhia uh a, Edom gam mong Hor Mual-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Israel mite Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum sawmlina, a kha ngana, a ni masa ni-in Topa' thupiakna tawh Hor Mual tungah siampi Aaron paito-in tua lai-ah a si hi
Hor Mual-ah Aaron a sihin kum za leh kum sawmnih leh kum thum a pha hi
Kanaan gamsung Negeb gamah a teng Kanaan mi Arad kumpipa in Israel mite hong paina thu a za hi
Hor Mual panin amaute dingkhia uh a, Zalmonah-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Zalmonah panin dingkhia uh a, Punon-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Punon panin dingkhia uh a, Oboth-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Oboth panin dingkhia uh a, Moab gamsung Iyeabarim-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Iyim panin dingkhia uh a, Dibongad-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Dibongad panin dingkhia uh a, Almondiblathaim-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Almondiblathaim panin dingkhia uh a, Nebo tun' ma Abarim mualte-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Abarim mualte panin dingkhia uh a, Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah giahphual sat uh a
Jordan kiang Bethjeshimoth panin Moab zanglei sunga om Abelshittim dongah amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi.
Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jerikho kantanin Kanaan gam na tun' uh ciangin

note' mai panin tua gama mi khempeuh na hawlkhia ding uh a, amau' suang milimte khempeuh susia-in, a kisung amau' milimte khempeuh na susia ding uh a, mualtunga a biaknate khempeuh uh na sumang ding uh hi
Na neih dingun note' tungah leitang hong pia khin ka hih manin note in leitang luahin tua tungah na teng ding uh hi

Note in na minam uh tawh kizui-in aisaanna tawh leitang na luah ding uh hi. Minam tamte tungah a tam na pia ding uh a, minam tawmte tungah a tawm na pia ding uh hi. Mi khatpeuh-a' ding ai a phatna peuhpeuh ama-a' hi ding a, na pate uh nam tawh kizui-in na luah ding uh hi

Ahih hangin note' mai panin tua gama teng mite na hawlkhiat kei uh leh, na omsak lai uh mite pen na mittang uh a hong do, na pang uh a hong sun lingte tawh hong kibang ding uh a, na ten'na gam uhah note hong gimsak ding uh hi
Amaute tunga hih dinga ka ngaihsut bangin note' tungah kong hih ding hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.
